raw_text:

  "claims": [
    "Members of the Navajo, Comanche, Lakota, Muscogee, Mohawk, Meskwaki, Tlingit, Hopi, Cree, Crow, and Choctaw Nations all heroically served as Code Talkers during World War II.",
